title: Auto Bell 2.0
description: An automated bell system for schools that rings bells and makes voice announcements based on predefined schedules. Uses VB.net with Text-to-Speech engine for voice capabilities.

images.title: Bell Schedule
images.desc: Configure automated bell timing schedules for different days.

images.title: Settings Panel
images.desc: Customize bell tones, volumes, and system preferences.

images.title: Announcements
images.desc: Broadcast voice or text announcements through the system.
